overview: A premium digital products website for leaders and executives, featuring compendiums, frameworks, playbooks, guides, and handbooks — with Stripe checkout, lead capture, FAQ support chat, and Facebook Pixel ad tracking.
features: Premium product showcase with placeholder cards for all 5 product types
Lead capture form (name + email) before every purchase
Stripe payment processing for paid digital products
Facebook Pixel tracking for page visits and purchase conversions
Built-in FAQ/Q&A support widget with admin-managed answers
Protected admin dashboard to manage products, leads, FAQ items, and Pixel ID
Deep navy and gold premium branding throughout
